case_title: DINA MARY TURNER et al VS. PLANT INSULATION COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL HEARING SET FOR JUL-20-2009 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT 206
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION (TRANSACTION ID # 26109616)
CASE IS DISMISSED AS TO DOES ONE THROUGH SEVENTY-FIVE INCLUSIVE PER COURT'S ORDER AT APR-15-2009 STATUS CONFERENCE. JUDGE MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: JOE VICSTEIN (206)

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUL-09-2009 TO ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUL-16-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PROOF OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098 (206)

PRELIMINARY FACT SHEET/NEW FILING/ ASBESTOS LITIGATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURNER, DINA MARY INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO DECEDENT ARTHUR TURNER YUHAS, CHRISTINE MARIE TURNER, THOMAS TURNER, MICHAEL

ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON APR-23-2009 FOR PLAINTIFF TO SHOW CAUSE WHY DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION HAS NOT BEEN FILED WAS HELD. THE COURT AND PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL CONFER ON THE STATUS OF NON-ANSWERING DEFENDANTS. THE COURT ORDERED THIS CASE TO JOIN OTHER CASES IN CLAPPER GROUP 38. TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/20/09 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR IS SET FOR 7/9/09 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PLAINTIFF TO REPORT ON THE STATUS OF DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF TRIAL AND CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ/D. LOK; REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098

ASBESTOS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURNER, DINA MARY INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO DECEDENT ARTHUR TURNER YUHAS, CHRISTINE MARIE TURNER, THOMAS TURNER, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY DOES ONE THROUGH SEVENTY-FIVE INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-15-2009

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO CHRISTINE MARIE YUHAS, AND DINA MARY TURNER, AND MICHAEL TURNER, AND THOMAS TURNER SET FOR APR-23-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 AS TO WHY DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION HAS NOT BEEN FILED. NOTICE GIVEN IN OPEN COURT AT 4-15-09 STATUS AND SETTING CONFERENCE ON THE RECORD. JUDGE MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN (206)

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUL-16-2009. ATTY. MATSON APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE TO GO OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780 (206)
